questionHtml:
The mass of nuclear fuel in a nuclear reactor decreases at the rate of 8 mg every hour. The overall reaction process has an efficiency of 50 %. What is the maximum power output of the reactor?

A.  100 MW

B.  200 MW

C.  100 GW

D.  200 GW
